goal: Build Android APK on Termux (ARM64) that bridges Bluetooth SPP to TCP localhost

errors_and_fixes.cause: aapt2 v13 uses API incompatible with platform-36 android.jar
errors_and_fixes.command: aapt package -f -M AndroidManifest.xml -I android.jar -S res -J R -F base.apk

errors_and_fixes.error: No resource identifier found for attribute 'maxSdkVersion', 'allowBackup', 'exported'
errors_and_fixes.cause: /system/framework/framework.jar is DEX runtime, lacks attrs.xml binary definitions
errors_and_fixes.note: Platform extracted to android-36/ subdirectory, created symlink android.jar -> android-36/android.jar

errors_and_fixes.error: Source option 7 is no longer supported

errors_and_fixes.cause: Lambda expressions require LambdaMetafactory not available when compiling against Android SDK
errors_and_fixes.fix: Replace ALL lambdas (->) with anonymous classes or named inner classes
errors_and_fixes.rule: NEVER use lambdas when javac target is Android SDK

errors_and_fixes.error: NullPointerException: Cannot invoke 'String.length()' because '<parameter1>' is null
errors_and_fixes.cause: BUG in D8/R8 3.3.20-dev on Termux/ARM64. Crashes on ALL inner classes (anonymous OR named)
errors_and_fixes.rule: NEVER use d8 on Termux. Use dx --dex --output=classes.dex <dir>

errors_and_fixes.error: class name does not match path
errors_and_fixes.cause: dx needs directory root, not individual .class files
errors_and_fixes.fix: Pass class directory as argument: dx --dex --output=classes.dex build/classes

errors_and_fixes.cause: aapt add runs in APK_DIR but classes.dex is in BUILD_DIR
errors_and_fixes.fix: cp classes.dex to APK_DIR before aapt add

errors_and_fixes.error: No resource identifier found for attribute 'versionCode' in package 'android'
errors_and_fixes.cause: aapt v1 doesn't support --version-code and --version-name flags with SDK 36 android.jar OR flags conflict
errors_and_fixes.fix: Remove --version-code and --version-name flags. Let it default.

errors_and_fixes.error: There was a problem parsing the package
errors_and_fixes.cause: UNKNOWN - APK seems valid but Android rejects. Possible: missing versionCode, AndroidManifest issues, or aapt v1 producing incompatible APK
errors_and_fixes.fix: INVESTIGATING. Need to check: 1) versionCode not in APK, 2) manifest attribute compatibility, 3) aapt v1 vs platform-36 version mismatch
errors_and_fixes.hypothesis: aapt v1 from SDK 13 may produce APKs incompatible with Android 14+ (SDK 36). Need aapt v1 from newer SDK, OR use aapt2 with compatible platform, OR build on PC.

critical_rules: DO NOT use aapt2 on Termux
DO NOT use d8 on Termux
DO NOT use lambdas in Java code targeting Android
DO NOT use system framework.jar for aapt compilation
ALWAYS use dx for DEX conversion
ALWAYS download full SDK platform (not framework.jar)

possible_causes: aapt v1 producing malformed binary XML
classes.dex format from dx incompatible with modern ART
next_steps: Try aapt2 with platform-33 (matching tool version)
Or accept defeat: build on PC with Android Studio
Or use aapt2 --min-sdk 21 flag with platform-33
